name: WarpGrep
description: Native Morph WarpGrep codebase search for the current workspace.

apiKey.label: Morph API Key
apiKey.help: Morph API key used for WarpGrep searches. Falls back to MORPH_API_KEY or WARPGREP_API_KEY.

baseUrl.label: Morph API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Override the Morph API base URL.

timeoutMs.label: Search Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a WarpGrep search.

includes.label: Include Globs
includes.help: Optional glob allowlist passed to WarpGrep.

excludes.label: Exclude Globs
excludes.help: Optional glob denylist passed to WarpGrep.
